description: SSL Config Core is a Scala library for configuring Java SSL/TLS settings, including protocols, cipher suites, key stores, trust stores, hostname verification, and SSLContext construction. It centralizes secure-by-default TLS configuration for clients and servers used by Play WS, Akka HTTP, and other JVM libraries.

SSL Config Core is a Scala library for configuring Java SSL/TLS settings, including protocols, cipher suites, key stores, trust stores, hostname verification, and SSLContext construction. It centralizes secure-by-default TLS configuration for clients and servers used by Play WS, Akka HTTP, and other JVM libraries.

SSL Config Core is a Scala library for configuring Java SSL/TLS settings, including protocols, cipher suites, key stores, trust stores, hostname verification, and SSLContext construction. It centralizes secure-by-default TLS configuration for clients and servers used by Play WS, Akka HTTP, and other JVM libraries.
